title: Lumi and the Silver Night
cover_prompt: A tiny glowing girl with silver hair sits on a crescent moon, her hands gently cradling fireflies. The sky is deep blue with soft watercolor clouds, and a few sleepy birds nestle in the branches below.
lyrics:
[verse]
One bright star blinks up so high
Softly winks one sleepy eye

[verse]
One bright star blinks up so high
Softly winks one sleepy eye
Two slow clouds drift by the moon
Gently hum a quiet tune

[verse]
One bright star blinks up so high
Softly winks one sleepy eye
Two slow clouds drift by the moon
Gently hum a quiet tune
Three small birds tuck wings so tight
Dreaming sweet through silver night

[verse]
One bright star blinks up so high
Softly winks one sleepy eye
Two slow clouds drift by the moon
Gently hum a quiet tune
Three small birds tuck wings so tight
Dreaming sweet through silver night
Four soft winds sigh down the glen
Whisper low and then again
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, xylophone accompaniment

character.name: Lumi
character.identity: A gentle sky-child who watches over the night and sings the stars to sleep.
character.special: Her voice carries the quiet magic of the moon, lulling even the wind to rest.

about: A soothing cumulative lullaby where the sky’s own creatures and elements drift off one by one. The repetitive, gentle counting eases busy minds into stillness, while the soft imagery of the night sky wraps little ones in warmth and calm.
